taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, General Software Engineer
core_skills: React, React Native, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML
skill_match_scores: React:1.0, React Native:1.0, JavaScript:0.5, TypeScript:1.0, HTML:0.5
must_have_quals: Degree in Computer Science, a related field, or equivalent practical experience, 2+ years of software development experience building and maintaining mobile applications using React and React Native, Strong proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript and core web technologies (HTML and CSS), Experience delivering high-quality user interfaces with attention to performance, accessibility, and responsive design, Experience working with Node.js services, ideally using a backend-for-frontend (BFF) pattern, A solid understanding of data structures and algorithms, Experience translating requirements into thoughtful design and delivering maintainable, testable code, Familiarity with modern development workflows including Git/Github, pull requests, and code reviews, Experience working with CI/CD pipelines, preferably Jenkins or BuildKite, Experience working with cloud-based infrastructure, preferably AWS, including API Gateway and serverless patterns (e.g. Lambda)
preferred_quals: Experience with native mobile development on iOS and/or Android (e.g. Swift or Kotlin), Familiarity with OpenAPI or similar approaches to API documentation
core_responsibilities: You will be working FanDuel Sportsbook application, providing our customers with a best-in-class experience, You’ll play a pivotal part in making our platform highly usable and will write clear, scalable, and high-quality code, You will work continuously to improve architecture and processes to improve quality and efficiency, Your work is consistently of high quality, You solve difficult problems, applying appropriate technologies and best practices, You work with your team to invent, design and build software that is stable and performant, You are proficient in a broad range of design approaches and know when it is appropriate to use them and when it is not, Your solutions are pragmatic, You consider the legacy of the code you produce and write code that an Engineer unfamiliar with the system can understand, You limit the use of short-term workarounds
job_summary: FanDuel is the premier mobile gaming company in the United States and Canada, seeking a Software Engineer to enhance their Sportsbook application. The role involves writing high-quality, maintainable code, improving architecture, and actively participating in team processes to deliver a best-in-class user experience.
